items.summary: Fix the 'Is your design ready?' option selector on the QuotationRequestPage so that clicking Yes/No options visually updates the selected state and correctly stores the chosen value. The toggle must respond to user interaction and reflect the active selection with proper styling.

Fix the admin authentication and routing logic so that on the live production app, a valid admin login (via email/password) correctly redirects to the Admin Dashboard instead of showing 'Go to Admin Setup' or 'Return to Home'. Investigate the AdminGuard and AdminLoginPage components: ensure session storage keys and values are written and read consistently, and that the admin-exists check and credential verification work correctly in production (not just in draft/preview). The fix must make email/password admin login work reliably on the deployed app.

Add a clearly visible, standalone 'Admin Login' link or button on the main site (e.g., in the footer or as a small discreet link on the HomePage) so admins can always navigate directly to /admin/login without needing to know the URL. This provides a reliable alternative entry point to the admin area.
